case_title: CHALLENGE DAIRY PRODUCTS VS JUICE & WAFFLE BARS INC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-10-1998, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO AUG-25-1998 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $571.35 FILED BY CHALLENGE DAIRY PRODUCTS AS TO DEFENDANT JUICE & WAFFLE BARS INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-10-1998 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO JUICE & WAFFLE BARS INC.RETURNED -NO SUCH NUMBER;

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHALLENGE DAIRY PRODUCTS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JUICE & WAFFLE BARS INC. $571.35 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $591.35, DEFT'S NAME CORRECTED IN OPEN COURT PER STIPULATION OF PARTIES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
